hero.heading: I grow the businesses that make life better — so their good
hero.sub: Helping people is the single thing that gives me the most joy. I can't reach everyone myself — so I build the tools that let honest businesses reach the people who need them.

reframe.line2: I remove what stands between you
reframe.line3: and the people who need you."

circles.label: Why
circles.body: To help honest businesses do more good, so more people get the help they were built to give. It pains me to watch people struggle when help already exists.

circles.label: How
circles.body: I start with the people you serve, not the tech. I work in whatever medium the problem needs — websites, systems, automation, connected devices, custom software — and I build things you can still run after I'm gone.

circles.label: What
circles.body: Digital tools chosen to grow your impact, not just your revenue: sites, internal systems, automation, devices, and bespoke programs.

projects.description: Rebuilt their online presence with a direct booking engine — removing OTA dependency and letting their authentic story do the selling.
B2B ordering platform and logistics dashboard for a small organic herb cooperative, connecting them with restaurants and health shops across Morocco.
Volunteer matching platform and student progress tracker for a tutoring cooperative serving underprivileged students in Casablanca.

services.sub: I don't lead with a technology stack. I start with what you're trying to accomplish and choose whatever makes the most sense — often simpler than you expect.

items.title: Websites & Web Apps
items.desc: From landing pages to full platforms — built to convert, to last, and to be yours after I leave.

items.title: Internal Systems
items.desc: Dashboards, tools, and workflows your team will actually use — designed around how you already think.

items.title: Automation
items.desc: Remove the repetitive. Free your people for the work that actually needs a human behind it.

items.title: Connected Devices
items.desc: IoT solutions that bridge your digital operations and physical world — practical, not just clever.

items.title: Bespoke Software
items.desc: Whatever the problem needs. Purpose-built, documented, and handed over — not held hostage.

principles: It's not about me. I lead with your world, not my skill list.
You own everything — no lock-in, no jargon, plain language as we go.
I'm measured on your outcome, not on my cleverness.
Honest work, for honest businesses, only.
I build things you can still run after I'm gone.
process.audit: You may have hired a developer who vanished halfway, overcharged, or left you with something only they could touch. That's exactly why I work this way — stated out loud, so it can't surprise either of us.

contact.sub: I start every conversation the same way — understanding your world before I say anything about mine.
contact.discoveryLabel: On our first call, I'll ask:
questions: What made you reach out now?
What's the hardest part of running this, day to day?
What would have to change for this to feel worth it to you?
contact.tip: I'll keep summarizing your world back until you say "that's right." Let "no" stay safe — that's the whole point.
contact.closingNote: "Lead with the why. The what will take care of itself."
